segments.text: Then the kingdom of heaven shall be likened to ten virgins who took their lamps and went out to meet the bridegroom.
Now five of them were wise, and five were foolish.
Those who were foolish took their lamps and took no oil with them,
but the wise took oil in their vessels with their lamps.
But while the bridegroom was delayed, they all slumbered and slept.
And at midnight a cry was heard:
Behold, the bridegroom is coming; go out to meet him!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then all those virgins arose and trimmed their lamps.
And the foolish said to the wise,
Give us some of your oil, for our lamps are going out.
segments.speaker: Foolish Virgins

segments.text: But the wise answered, saying,
No, lest there should not be enough for us and you; but go rather to those who sell, and buy for yourselves.
segments.speaker: Wise Virgins

segments.text: And while they went to buy, the bridegroom came, and those who were ready went in with him to the wedding; and the door was shut.
Afterward the other virgins came also, saying,
Lord, Lord, open to us!
segments.speaker: Other Virgins

segments.text: But he answered and said,
Assuredly, I say to you, I do not know you.
segments.speaker: Bridegroom

segments.text: Watch therefore, for you know neither the day nor the hour in which the Son of Man is coming.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For the kingdom of heaven is like a man traveling to a far country, who called his own servants and delivered his goods to them.
And to one he gave five talents, to another two, and to another one, to each according to his own ability; and immediately he went on a journey.
Then he who had received the five talents went and traded with them, and made another five talents.
And likewise he who had received two gained two more also.
But he who had received one went and dug in the ground, and hid his lord's money.
After a long time the lord of those servants came and settled accounts with them.
So he who had received five talents came and brought five other talents, saying,
Lord, you delivered to me five talents; look, I have gained five more talents besides them.
segments.speaker: First Servant

segments.text: His lord said to him,
Well done, good and faithful servant; you were faithful over a few things, I will make you ruler over many things. Enter into the joy of your lord.
segments.speaker: Lord

segments.text: He also who had received two talents came and said,
Lord, you delivered to me two talents; look, I have gained two more talents besides them.
segments.speaker: Second Servant

segments.text: His lord said to him,
Well done, good and faithful servant; you have been faithful over a few things, I will make you ruler over many things. Enter into the joy of your lord.
segments.speaker: Lord

segments.text: Then he who had received the one talent came and said,
Lord, I knew you to be a hard man, reaping where you have not sown, and gathering where you have not scattered seed.
segments.speaker: Third Servant

segments.text: And I was afraid, and went and hid your talent in the ground. Look, there you have what is yours.
segments.speaker: Third Servant

segments.text: But his lord answered and said to him,
You wicked and lazy servant, you knew that I reap where I have not sown, and gather where I have not scattered seed.
segments.speaker: Lord

segments.text: So you ought to have deposited my money with the bankers, and at my coming I would have received back my own with interest.
segments.speaker: Lord

segments.text: Therefore take the talent from him, and give it to him who has ten talents.
segments.speaker: Lord

segments.text: For to everyone who has, more will be given, and he will have abundance; but from him who does not have, even what he has will be taken away.
segments.speaker: Lord

segments.text: And cast the unprofitable servant into the outer darkness. There will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
segments.speaker: Lord

verses.title: The Son of Man Will Judge the Nations

segments.text: When the Son of Man comes in His glory, and all the holy angels with Him, then He will sit on the throne of His glory.
All the nations will be gathered before Him, and He will separate them one from another, as a shepherd divides his sheep from the goats.
And He will set the sheep on His right hand, but the goats on the left.
Then the King will say to those on His right hand,
Come, you blessed of My Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for I was hungry and you gave Me food; I was thirsty and you gave Me drink; I was a stranger and you took Me in;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I was naked and you clothed Me; I was sick and you visited Me; I was in prison and you came to Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then the righteous will answer Him, saying,
Lord, when did we see You hungry and feed You, or thirsty and give You drink?
segments.speaker: Righteous

segments.text: When did we see You a stranger and take You in, or naked and clothe You?
segments.speaker: Righteous

segments.text: Or when did we see You sick, or in prison, and come to You?
segments.speaker: Righteous

segments.text: And the King will answer and say to them,
Assuredly, I say to you, inasmuch as you did it to one of the least of these My brethren, you did it to Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then He will also say to those on the left hand,
Depart from Me, you cursed, into the everlasting fire prepared for the devil and his angels:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: for I was hungry and you gave Me no food; I was thirsty and you gave Me no drink;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I was a stranger and you did not take Me in, naked and you did not clothe Me, sick and in prison and you did not visit Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then they also will answer Him, saying,
Lord, when did we see You hungry or thirsty or a stranger or naked or sick or in prison, and did not minister to You?
segments.speaker: Unrighteous

segments.text: Then He will answer them, saying,
Assuredly, I say to you, inasmuch as you did not do it to one of the least of these, you did not do it to Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And these will go away into everlasting punishment, but the righteous into eternal life.
